task_completion.description: Verify the telescope mount is configured to track the correct target star.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a telescope control GUI (e.g., KStars, Ekos Mount tab, or similar observatory software) showing the target set to 'Mintaka' or tracking coordinates around RA 05h 32m (5.53h) and Dec -00d 17m (-0.299°).

task_completion.description: Verify the focuser absolute position is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the focuser control panel (e.g., Ekos Focus module) showing the absolute focus position explicitly set to 31500.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct filter slot is selected for the camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the filter wheel control panel or capture settings (e.g., Ekos Capture module) showing Filter Slot 2 (or V-band) selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the high-cadence image sequence was captured and saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sequence capture running/completed in the GUI showing at least 40 frames, OR a file manager/terminal window showing multiple FITS image files successfully saved in '/home/ga/Images/pec_run'.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary report was created with the required documentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor open showing a file named 'pec_summary.txt' in the ~/Documents directory, containing details about the PEC data gathering run.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual observatory control software (GUI) to configure the telescope and capture images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that screenshots show interaction with a graphical telescope control application (like KStars/Ekos) rather than just terminal commands mocking the hardware state.

integrity.description: Ensure the image sequence was generated by the capture software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the capture module's progress bar, sequence queue, or exposure countdown, proving the images were actually taken via the software and not just created via a script.

integrity.description: Ensure the summary report was written in a text editor or word processor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report 'pec_summary.txt' should be visible in a GUI text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or nano in a terminal), not just generated via a single 'echo' command without verification.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct parameters for the PEC calibration run are: Target = Mintaka (RA 05h 32m 00s / 5.5333h, Dec -00d 17m 57s / -0.299°); Focuser absolute position = 31500; Filter = Slot 2 (V-band); Minimum frames to capture = 40; Output directory = /home/ga/Images/pec_run; Report path = /home/ga/Documents/pec_summary.txt.
